title: Disticholiparis nebuligena
intro: There is not enough information in any database about the Disticholiparis nebuligena plant to create the paragraph you have requested.
taxonomy: Disticholiparis nebuligena is a species within the family Lipariidae. It belongs to the order Monogenea and the class Trematoda. This classification places it within the phylum Platyhelminthes. The specific classification of Disticholiparis nebuligena reflects its status as a type of flatworm, specifically a monogenean. Further research may provide more detailed information on its classification.
